title: Worldpay and Bullish join Midnight's alliance of federated node operators ahead of mainnet launch
message_html: Worldpay and Bullish join Midnight's alliance of federated node operators ahead of mainnet launch ...
snippet: NIGHT: Worldpay and Bullish join Midnight's alliance of federated node operators ahead of mainnet launch

title: Sama's World Network launches AgentKit to verify real humans behind AI transactions
message_html: Sama's World Network launches AgentKit to verify real humans behind AI transactions ...
snippet: CoinDesk (@CoinDesk): NEW: @sama's @worldnetwork has launched AgentKit to verify real humans behind AI transactions. The toolkit integrates with @coinbase's x402 protocol, letting AI agents pay each other directly with no human intervention required.
